description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 4/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify typed result DSL and runtime finalization.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Added typed result contract coverage for generated result helpers, structured-output instructions, and JSON Schema conversion. Existing runtime finalization tests continue to verify parsed result replacement before result controls run.

title: E3: Verify typed result DSL and runtime finalization
